revision.text: ⟨{{{1}}}⟩{{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: ⟨{{{1}}}⟩{{documentation}}
#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Angbr IPA]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Angbr IPA]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: ⟨{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=IPA|_include-positional=yes}}⟩<noinclude>{{documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: ⟨{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=IPA|_include-positional=yes}}⟩<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Angbr_IPA here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
